title: Here’s when gas prices and airfares could go down if the Iran cease-fire holds
summary: An Iran ceasefire could eventually lower gas prices and airfares, though drivers shouldn't expect an immediate return to pre-war prices. The stock market rallied on news of the ceasefire, signaling investor optimism about reduced energy prices.
content: Stock markets were rallying on Wednesday, but drivers shouldn’t hold their breath waiting for a return to prewar gas prices.

zh.title: 如果伊朗停火协议得以维持，汽油价格和机票何时可能下降
zh.summary: 伊朗停火可能最终导致汽油价格和机票下降，但驾驶者不应期望立即回到战前价格。股市对停火协议的消息做出积极反应，表明投资者对能源价格下降持乐观态度。

title: We asked our wedding guests to give money to St. Jude’s Children’s Hospital. Can we write off their donations?
summary: A couple directed wedding gifts to St. Jude's Children's Hospital instead of traditional gifts, raising questions about tax deduction eligibility for donations made by wedding guests rather than the couple themselves.
content: “There were substantial donations made.”

zh.title: 我们请婚礼宾客向圣裘德儿童医院捐款。我们能否扣除他们的捐款？
zh.summary: 一对夫妇将婚礼礼物转向圣裘德儿童医院而不是传统礼物，这引发了关于由婚礼宾客而非夫妇本身进行的捐款的税收抵扣资格的问题。

title: Interest rates are headed lower — real yields suggest a half-point Fed cut is coming
summary: Real yield data suggests the Federal Reserve may cut interest rates by half a percentage point, with the Iran ceasefire potentially serving as the catalyst the Fed needs to proceed with rate reductions.
content: The Iran cease-fire may be the ‘green light’ the Fed needs.

zh.title: 利率将下降——实际收益率暗示美联储可能会降息半个百分点
zh.summary: 实际收益率数据表明美联储可能会将利率降低半个百分点，伊朗停火可能成为美联储推进降息所需的催化剂。

title: NI fuel protesters 'stand in solidarity' with Irish counterparts
summary: Northern Ireland fuel protesters participated in a vehicle convoy demonstration to express solidarity with Irish counterparts, highlighting cross-border coordination among fuel industry protesters.
content: A convoy of vans, lorries, tractors, and even a limousine took part in a slow moving protest around the town centre on Saturday afternoon.

zh.summary: 北爱尔兰燃料抗议者参加了车队示威游行，以表示与爱尔兰同行的团结，强调了燃料行业抗议者之间的跨境协调。

title: 15 stocks to put on your list to buy when the market recovers
summary: As markets recover, 15 stocks positioned to benefit from changing market liquidity conditions are identified as solid outperformance candidates, though selection requires careful consideration of specific circumstances.
content: These stocks are good bets to outperform. because they’re sensitive to changes in market liquidity.

zh.title: 当市场复苏时，15只股票值得加入你的购买清单
zh.summary: 随着市场复苏，15只能够从不断变化的市场流动性条件中受益的股票被确定为稳健的超额表现候选股，但选择需要仔细考虑具体情况。

title: Buying a car out of state can save you thousands of dollars — but ask these 3 questions first
summary: Stubbornly high car prices are pushing buyers to search across state lines for better deals, but prospective out-of-state car buyers should carefully consider three key questions before making the purchase.
content: Stubbornly high car prices are pushing more buyers to expand their search radius beyond state lines to find a deal.

zh.title: 在州外购买汽车可以为您节省数千美元——但首先要问这3个问题

title: The $7 billion reason the Big Ten is dominating college sports
summary: The Big Ten conference's dominance in college sports is fueled by a $7 billion television deal and its nationwide geographic reach, creating a structural advantage over competing conferences.
content: A $7 billion TV deal and nationwide reach are fueling the Big Ten’s dominance in college sports.

zh.title: 大十联盟主导大学体育的70亿美元原因
zh.summary: 大十联盟在大学体育中的主导地位由70亿美元的电视转播协议及其全国范围的地理覆盖推动，相比竞争联盟创造了结构性优势。

title: Stocks gain on Iran ceasefire, plus 3 more things that drove last week's market
summary: The S&P 500 closed the week up 3.6%, driven primarily by market enthusiasm over an Iran ceasefire alongside three additional positive market factors, despite cooling momentum on Friday.
content: Although the market rally cooled on Friday, the S&P 500 still ended the week 3.6% higher.

zh.title: 股票因伊朗停火上涨，以及推动上周市场的另外3个因素
zh.summary: 标普500指数本周收盘上涨3.6%，主要由伊朗停火引发的市场热情推动，加上三个额外的积极市场因素，尽管周五动能有所冷却。

title: Battles brew over in-state tuition for undocumented students
summary: Some states offer in-state tuition to undocumented students meeting specific requirements, but these laws are increasingly facing legal and political challenges that threaten their viability.
content: In some states, undocumented students have access to in-state college tuition if they meet certain requirements. Now, many of those laws are being challenged.

zh.title: 围绕无证学生州内学费的争战
zh.summary: 一些州向符合特定要求的无证学生提供州内学费，但这些法律越来越多地面临法律和政治挑战，威胁其可行性。

title: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
summary: Growing private credit crisis concerns are creating turbulence in fixed-income ETFs as the expanding but less transparent private credit market becomes more integrated into bond portfolios.
content: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.

zh.title: 债券市场私募信贷危机担忧如何在固定收益ETF中显现
zh.summary: 日益增长的私募信贷危机担忧在固定收益ETF中造成了动荡，因为不断扩大但透明度较低的私募信贷市场与债券投资组合的整合程度不断加深。

title: A mom and tech entrepreneur building AI advocate for rare-disease families like hers
summary: Entrepreneur and mother founded Citizen Health, an AI-powered healthcare startup that helps rare disease patients manage their conditions while advancing treatment research and supporting affected families.
content: AI-powered healthcare startup Citizen Health is using the technology to focus on rare disease, helping manage patient lives as well as advance treatments.

zh.title: 母亲兼科技创业者为罕见病患者家庭构建AI倡导平台
zh.summary: 企业家兼母亲创立了Citizen Health，这是一个AI驱动的医疗保健初创公司，帮助罕见病患者管理他们的病情，同时推进治疗研究并支持受影响的家庭。

title: How to help kids form healthy relationships with money: They 'end up in much better financial shape' as adults, psychologist says
summary: Psychologists and financial experts emphasize that teaching children healthy financial habits and literacy skills during childhood leads to significantly better financial outcomes in adulthood, making it increasingly important amid rising costs.
content: Amid rising costs and a tighter economic climate, more parents are teaching their kids financial literacy lessons that could serve them well later in life.

zh.title: 如何帮助孩子建立与金钱的健康关系：心理学家表示他们成年后"财务状况会好得多"
zh.summary: 心理学家和财务专家强调，在童年时期教孩子养成健康的财务习惯和金融素养技能会导致他们成年后的财务成果明显改善，这在生活成本上升的情况下变得越来越重要。

title: Intel leads the list of most overbought stocks after this week's comeback rally
summary: Intel experienced a notable recovery this week with double-digit gains, attempting to shed its image as a legacy technology company. The stock's strong performance has put it on the list of overbought equities following the broader market rally.
content: Intel posted a double-digit gain on the week as it appeared to start shedding its reputation as an old guard stalwart.

title: How Kodak is trying to turn around its business after teetering on bankruptcy
summary: Eastman Kodak, the photography company that once nearly collapsed, is pursuing a turnaround strategy under CEO Jim Continenza. The executive is focused on revitalizing the company's operations following years of financial hardship.
content: Photography company Eastman Kodak has seen its fair share of financial struggles, but CEO Jim Continenza is determined to fuel its success.

zh.title: 柯达如何在濒临破产后扭转业务局面

title: Vibe check from inside one of AI industry's main events: 'Claude mania'
summary: At the HumanX conference in San Francisco, Anthropic's AI momentum and Claude were topics generating significant industry buzz. The company's presence and latest developments were widely discussed among attendees.

title: LinkedIn executive reveals the biggest mistake you can make with AI at work
summary: A LinkedIn executive warns that over-relying on AI tools at work can undermine individual contribution and unique human capabilities. Excessive AI use means workers aren't exercising their distinctive skills and creativity.
content: “If you’re overusing AI, that means you’re not doing anything unique as a human in that process.”

zh.title: LinkedIn高管揭示在工作中使用AI犯的最大错误
zh.summary: 一位LinkedIn高管警告称，在工作中过度依赖AI工具可能会削弱个人贡献和独特的人类能力。过度使用AI意味着员工无法充分发挥自己独特的技能和创意。

title: A short-covering rally has stocks on shaky footing. Here’s what could happen next.
summary: U.S. stocks have surged in recent trading, but the rally appears to be driven by short-covering activity rather than fundamental strength. The market's footing remains uncertain as investors consider what might happen next in this volatile environment.
content: U.S. stocks have staged a blistering rebound, but who exactly has been doing the buying?

zh.title: 空头回补反弹使股票基础不稳，接下来可能会发生什么
zh.summary: 美国股票在近期交易中大幅上涨，但这次反弹似乎是由空头回补活动推动的，而不是基本面强劲。由于投资者考虑在这个波动的环境中接下来可能会发生什么，市场基础仍然不确定。

title: A little known semiconductor packaging and testing stock is poised to gain in AI boom. Why analysts like it
summary: Amkor Technologies, a semiconductor packaging and testing company, is positioned to benefit from the AI data center boom as a derivative play on artificial intelligence growth. Analysts view the company favorably given the expanding infrastructure demands of the AI industry.

title: Berkshire electric utility's court win could save it billions
summary: PacifiCorp, an electric utility owned by Berkshire Hathaway, secured a significant court victory that could reduce wildfire liability damages by $1 billion or more. The ruling represents a major financial benefit for the company's long-term balance sheet.
content: PacifiCorp court win could reduce wildfire damages by $1 billion or more.

zh.title: 伯克希尔电力公司法庭胜诉可能节省数十亿美元
zh.summary: PacifiCorp是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司旗下的电力公司，获得了重大法庭胜利，这可能会将野火责任赔偿减少10亿美元或更多。这一裁决对公司的长期资产负债表具有重大财务益处。

title: It’s been one of Wall Street’s most heated AI debates — and it may be totally missing the point
summary: The debate over whether copper cables or optical components are better positioned for AI networking may be overlooking a more important reality: both technologies could benefit significantly from the AI boom. An analyst suggests that this either-or framing misses the opportunity for both to thrive.
content: Are copper cables or optical components best positioned to support the AI-networking boom? An analyst sees room for both technologies to win big.

zh.title: 这是华尔街最激烈的AI辩论之一——但可能完全偏离了重点
zh.summary: 关于铜缆还是光学元件更适合AI网络的辩论可能忽视了一个更重要的现实：两种技术都可能从AI热潮中获益匪浅。一位分析师认为，这种非此即彼的框架忽视了两者都能茁壮成长的机会。

title: Will AI start ‘going rogue’? The chorus of warnings is getting louder.
summary: As artificial intelligence models become increasingly powerful, concerns are mounting about the risks of systems malfunctioning or being exploited by malicious actors. The growing chorus of warnings reflects heightened vigilance in the AI industry about safety and misuse scenarios.
content: As AI models get more powerful, there’s growing risk they will go off the rails or get misused by bad actors.

zh.title: AI会开始"失控"吗？警告声越来越大
zh.summary: 随着人工智能模型变得越来越强大，人们对系统故障或被恶意行为者利用的风险的担忧不断增加。日益增多的警告声反映了AI行业对安全和滥用情景的提高警觉。

title: Summer travel costs are up this year. 5 of the best ways to save money on your trip.
summary: With rising gas and airfare prices expected to increase summer travel costs, experts have identified five practical strategies to help travelers reduce their expenses. The recommendations focus on finding deals and optimizing travel budgets in an inflationary environment.
content: As gas and airfare prices rise, we found the best ways you can save on summer travel.

zh.title: 今年夏季旅游成本上升。度假省钱的5个最佳方式。
zh.summary: 随着汽油和机票价格预计上涨导致夏季旅游成本增加，专家已确定了五种实用策略来帮助旅行者减少开支。这些建议侧重于在通胀环境中寻找优惠和优化旅游预算。

title: EU airline industry warns of fuel shortages if Strait of Hormuz stays closed
summary: The Airports Council International (ACI) Europe has raised alarm about potential jet fuel supply disruptions affecting European airlines if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. The warning highlights global supply chain risks and their direct impact on aviation operations.
content: Airports Council International (ACI) Europe said its members had "increasing concerns" about the availability of jet fuel.

zh.title: 欧盟航空业警告荷木兹海峡关闭可能导致燃料短缺
zh.summary: 国际机场理事会欧洲分会就荷木兹海峡保持关闭可能导致的喷气燃料供应中断对欧洲航空公司的影响提出警告。该警告突显了全球供应链风险及其对航空运营的直接影响。

title: OpenAI identifies security issue involving third-party tool, says user data was not accessed
summary: OpenAI discovered a security vulnerability in a third-party tool but confirmed that no user data was compromised and that its systems and intellectual property remain intact. The ChatGPT maker has disclosed the incident transparently while reassuring users of their security.
content: The ChatGPT maker said it found no evidence that its user data was accessed or that its systems or intellectual property were compromised.

zh.title: OpenAI发现涉及第三方工具的安全问题，称用户数据未被访问
zh.summary: OpenAI在第三方工具中发现了一个安全漏洞，但确认没有用户数据被泄露，其系统和知识产权保持完好。这家ChatGPT制造商已透明地披露了该事件，同时向用户保证了其安全性。

title: U.S.-Iran talks set to begin in Pakistani capital after delegations arrive
summary: High-level diplomatic discussions between the United States and Iran are scheduled to begin in Islamabad, with delegations including Iran's parliament speaker and a U.S. team led by Vice President JD Vance. Pakistan is hosting the talks as tensions in the region remain elevated.
content: Pakistan confirmed the arrival of Iran's parliament speaker and foreign minister ahead of talks with a U.S. delegation led by Vice President JD Vance.

zh.title: 美伊谈判将在巴基斯坦首都代表团抵达后开始
zh.summary: 美国和伊朗之间的高层外交讨论定于在伊斯兰堡开始，包括伊朗议会议长和由副总统JD·万斯领导的美国代表团。巴基斯坦正在主办这些会谈，因为该地区紧张局势仍然居高不下。

title: Trump policies, China's biotech boom are ending Europe's pharma powerhouse era
summary: European pharmaceutical companies face challenges from Trump's policies and China's biotech growth, as the continent struggles with fragmented capital markets, limited single-market adoption, and uneven reimbursement policies. These structural issues threaten Europe's position as a global pharma powerhouse.
content: Companies have long lamented Europe's fragmented capital markets, single-market adoption on pricing and clinical trials, and uneven reimbursement policies.

zh.title: 特朗普政策和中国生物科技繁荣正在结束欧洲制药强国时代
zh.summary: 欧洲制药公司面临特朗普政策和中国生物科技增长带来的挑战，该地区面临资本市场分散、单一市场采纳有限和报销政策不均等的问题。这些结构性问题威胁欧洲作为全球制药强国的地位。

title: 'Every drop of water counts': Fear for the future of Argentina's glaciers
summary: Argentina's government has passed a controversial law removing environmental protections for the country's glaciers, opening them to mining operations. The decision threatens critical freshwater resources and ecosystems amid growing water scarcity concerns.
content: A controversial law to remove protections for the country's glaciers has passed, opening the doors for mining.

zh.title: "每一滴水都很重要"：对阿根廷冰川未来的担忧
zh.summary: 阿根廷政府通过了一项争议的法律，取消了对该国冰川的环保保护，使其开放给采矿业。这项决定在全球水资源短缺日益加剧的背景下，威胁关键的淡水资源和生态系统。

title: Artemis II astronauts hurtle home from moon toward splashdown
summary: NASA's four Artemis II astronauts are returning to Earth following a historic moon mission, with their Orion spacecraft scheduled for Pacific splashdown shortly after 8 p.m. ET. The return marks a major milestone in the agency's lunar exploration program.
content: NASA’s four Artemis II astronauts return to Earth after a historic moon mission, with Orion set for Pacific splashdown shortly after 8 p.m. ET.

zh.title: Artemis II 宇航员从月球急速返回溅落
zh.summary: NASA的四名Artemis II宇航员在历史性月球任务后正在返回地球，其猎户座飞船定于美国东部时间晚上8点后在太平洋溅落。此次返回标志着该机构月球探索计划的重大里程碑。

title: Rep. Eric Swalwell denies sexual assault allegations, rivals urge him to exit California governor's race
summary: Rep. Eric Swalwell has denied sexual assault allegations as he faces the loss of key endorsements just weeks before California's gubernatorial primary. The allegations and endorsement withdrawals threaten his candidacy in the race.
content: Rep. Eric Swalwell denies sexual assault allegations as key endorsements are pulled weeks before California’s gubernatorial primary.

zh.title: 众议员埃里克·斯瓦韦尔否认性侵犯指控，对手敦促他退出加州州长竞选
zh.summary: 众议员埃里克·斯瓦韦尔在面临关键支持撤回的情况下否认了性侵犯指控，这发生在加州州长初选前的几周。这些指控和支持撤回威胁了他在竞选中的候选资格。
